items.title: Speaker — Type-Safe AI Flows with Genkit & TypeScript

body.em: "No More undefined: Type-Safe AI Flows with Genkit & TypeScript"

body: at the local JS community's Power-Packed Tech Meetup. Co-presenters covered 3D web development and Antigravity / Cursor tooling.

items.title: International Judge — PIXEL USM
body: for the Software Engineering category — reviewed final-year projects from Computer Science (Intelligent Computing) students at PIXEL 2024 and PIXEL 2025.

items.title: Special Guest — Workshop on Angular
body: Day-long Angular workshop for the Department of Computer Technology, in association with the Institution's Innovation Council.

items.title: Speaker — State of Angular
body: Talk on Angular's recent feature additions and migrations. Sponsored by JetBrains and Thoughtworks Coimbatore.

items.title: Workshop Speaker — Bannari Amman
items.venue: with Vishnu Prasanth, Deepak G M
body: Earlier multi-speaker engagement at Bannari hosted by Babu Duraiswamy and PANDIYAN M for the Department of Computer Engineering students. Predates the Elanzaa'24 special-guest invitation.

items.title: Chief Guest — RISOVO National Symposium
body: Chief Guest at the National Level Technical Symposium organised by the Department of Computer Engineering. Addressed students and reviewed projects.

items.title: Speaker — Introduction to @ngrx/store
body: at the local frontend community meetup (~57 attendees). Co-presented with Dinesh (TrusTrace) on Angular unit testing with Jest.

items.title: Free Mentorship Program
body: with guest sessions from senior engineers (e.g., Kiruthiga Mukilan in the early batch). Relaunched as
with a sharper scope — weekly Sat/Sun 1-hour online sessions for 2nd/3rd-year college students interested in
. Casual interview screening selects 5–7 students per cohort; covers fundamentals, career guidance, and industry know-how.

items.title: Volunteer — NG-India 2025
body: Volunteered at the conference and championed TrusTrace team participation in the wider Angular community.

items.title: From Switches to AI: The Evolution of Software Development
body: First-person reflection on the AI coding-tool transition (Copilot, Cursor, VS Code Agent Mode) framed against the historical arc of programming. Six lessons from production Agent Mode use, with a production-readiness checklist.
